whyInvest.futureConnectivityDesc: Strategically located near upcoming transport hubs and highways.

whyInvest.organicGrowthDesc: Positioned in rapidly appreciating corridors for maximum ROI.

leadershipHome.heading: Visionary Leadership
leadershipHome.visionStatement: Our vision is to transform the infrastructure landscape by creating sustainable, premium, and value-driven real estate developments.
leadershipHome.founderStory: With over two decades of profound experience in infrastructure and real estate, our leadership has guided SVI Infra towards becoming a trusted name. We believe in transparency, legal security, and uncompromising quality.

testimonials.title: What Our Clients Say
testimonials.subtitle: Discover why hundreds of families and businesses trust SVI Infra Solutions for their real estate needs.

t0.text: Investing in their completed commercial project in Noida was the best decision. The footfall is amazing and the rental potential is excellent.

t1.text: We shifted to our new flat last month. The construction quality is top-class and it's 100% Vastu compliant. Very happy with SVI Infra.

t2.text: Possession was given exactly on time! Usually, builders delay a lot, but SVI Infra's completed projects are proof of their commitment.

t3.text: The location of their existing projects in Jaipur is prime. Perfect connectivity for daily commute and great neighborhood.

t4.text: Their property management team is very cooperative. Maintenance in the completed towers is excellent and hassle-free.

t5.text: Visited their site in Noida. The society is fully secure and the amenities for kids are really good. Finalized our booking the same day.

t6.text: Retail space in their completed project has given my shop a huge boost. Parking and security is totally tension-free.

t7.text: I only trust SVI Infra for investment. The resale value and demand of their existing projects is always high in the market.

t8.text: My parents are really happy with the new apartment. Society temple nearby and a great park for their evening walks.

t9.text: The value growth in the Noida completed project has been outstanding. Definitely a great choice for NRI investors.

t10.text: SVI Infra literally delivers what they promise in the brochure. No hidden charges and super transparent booking process.

t11.text: Maintenance of existing projects is so good that the society still looks brand new. Very proactive facility team.

t12.text: Leased an office space in their IT park. Electricity backup and internet connectivity is flawless. Great corporate vibe.

t13.text: Clubhouse and green area in their residential project is amazing. No need to go outside on weekends anymore.

t14.text: SVI Infra's completed commercial hubs have the best corporate crowd. Very premium feel and the layout is very spacious.

t15.text: Property papers and registry process was handled so smoothly. Really appreciate their legal team's support.

t16.text: The floor plan is very spacious. Proper attention has been paid to natural light and ventilation in the apartments.

t17.text: We checked multiple options in NCR, but SVI's existing projects offer the best value for money and lifestyle.

t18.text: Key handover ceremony was beautifully organized. Really felt like a VIP customer when taking possession.

t19.text: Trust is everything in real estate, and SVI's track record with completed projects speaks for itself. Extremely genuine builder.

about.title: About SVI Infra Solutions
about.heading: Building Legacies Since 2009
about.subtitle: Our Story
about.para1: For over 17 years, SVI Infra Solutions Pvt. Ltd. has been synonymous with trust, quality, and integrity in the Indian real estate market. We have successfully completed 15+ projects, delivering joy to over 5000+ happy clients.
about.para2: Our vision extends beyond just building structures; we create communities, shape lifestyles, and provide high-value investment avenues. Focused significantly on the Phulera Smart City, Jaipur region, and the DMIC/DFC corridors, our integrity-driven approach has made us a preferred partner for home buyers and investors alike.
about.faqSubtitle: Learn more about our commitment to quality, transparency, and customer satisfaction.
about.integrityDesc: Honesty and transparency in every transaction.
about.customerCentricityDesc: Putting our clients' needs and aspirations first.
about.innovationDesc: Pioneering new standards in real estate.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.heading: Our Privacy Policy
privacy.s1Content: SVI Infra Solutions Pvt. Ltd. ("we", "our", or "us") is committed to protecting your personal information. This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, disclose, and safeguard your information when you visit our website or use our services.
privacy.s2_1Intro: We may collect personal information that you voluntarily provide, including:
privacy.s2_1List: Full name, Email address, Phone number, Property interests and preferences, Messages and inquiries submitted through our forms
privacy.s2_2Intro: When you visit our website, we may automatically collect:
privacy.s2_2List: IP address and browser type, Device information and operating system, Pages visited and time spent on the website, Referring website URLs
privacy.s3Intro: We use the information we collect to:
privacy.s3List: Respond to your inquiries and provide customer support, Send property updates, newsletters, and promotional materials, Improve our website and services, Comply with legal obligations, Analyze website usage and trends
privacy.s4Content: We do not sell, trade, or rent your personal information to third parties.
privacy.s4List: Service providers who assist in operating our website, Legal authorities when required by law, Business partners with your explicit consent
privacy.s5Content: Our website uses cookies to enhance your browsing experience. Cookies are small files stored on your device that help us remember your preferences and understand how you use our website. You can control cookie settings through your browser preferences.
privacy.s6Content: We implement appropriate technical and organizational measures to protect your personal information against unauthorized access, alteration, disclosure, or destruction. However, no method of transmission over the Internet is 100% secure.
privacy.s7Intro: Depending on your location, you may have the right to:
privacy.s7List: Access your personal data, Correct inaccurate or incomplete data, Request deletion of your personal data, Object to or restrict processing of your data, Withdraw consent at any time
privacy.s8Content: Our website may contain links to third-party websites, including Google Maps and social media platforms. We are not responsible for the privacy practices of these external sites. We encourage you to review their privacy policies.
privacy.s9Content: Our website is not intended for children under 13 years of age. We do not knowingly collect personal information from children under 13.
privacy.s10Content: We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time. Changes will be posted on this page with an updated revision date. We encourage you to review this policy periodically.
privacy.s11Content: If you have questions about this Privacy Policy, please contact us at:

terms.title: Terms & Conditions
terms.heading: Terms of Use
terms.s1Content: By accessing and using the SVI Infra Solutions website ("Website"), you accept and agree to be bound by these Terms and Conditions. If you do not agree, please do not use this Website.
terms.s2Content: You agree to use this Website only for lawful purposes and in a manner that does not infringe the rights of others or restrict their use and enjoyment of the Website.
terms.s2List: You must not use the Website in any way that causes damage to the site, You must not attempt to gain unauthorized access to any portion of the Website, You must not use automated systems to access the Website without prior consent
terms.s3Content: The property information displayed on this Website is for informational purposes only. While we strive to provide accurate and up-to-date information:
terms.s3List: Property details, pricing, and availability are subject to change without notice, Images shown may be representative and may not reflect the actual property, All measurements and specifications should be independently verified, We do not guarantee the accuracy of any information provided by third parties
terms.s4Content: When you submit a registration or contact form:
terms.s4List: You confirm that the information provided is accurate and complete, You consent to being contacted by our team regarding your inquiry, You agree to receive property updates and promotional communications, You may opt out of communications at any time
terms.s5Content: All content on this Website, including text, images, logos, graphics, and design elements, is the property of SVI Infra Solutions Pvt. Ltd. and is protected by intellectual property laws.
terms.s6Content: To the maximum extent permitted by law, SVI Infra Solutions shall not be liable for:
terms.s6List: Any indirect, incidental, or consequential damages arising from use of the Website, Any errors or omissions in the content of the Website, Any interruption or suspension of the Website, Any decisions made based on information provided on the Website
terms.s7Content: Our Website may contain links to third-party websites, including Google Maps and social media platforms. These links are provided for your convenience and do not signify our endorsement.
terms.s8Content: These Terms and Conditions shall be governed by and construed in accordance with the laws of India. Any disputes arising from these terms shall be subject to the exclusive jurisdiction of the courts in Noida, Uttar Pradesh.
terms.s9Content: We reserve the right to modify these Terms and Conditions at any time. Changes will be effective immediately upon posting to the Website.
terms.s10Content: If you have any questions about these Terms and Conditions, please contact us at:

projects.currentSubtitle: Discover our ongoing developments. We are currently working on exciting new residential and commercial projects in prime locations, offering unparalleled amenities and lifestyle options.

projects.comingSoonDesc: We are currently working on exciting new residential and commercial projects in prime locations. Check back soon for detailed layouts, pricing, and availability.
projects.upcomingInterestDesc: Register your interest today to get early access and exclusive offers.

shivaniVatika.title: Shivani Vatika
shivaniVatika.description: A modern living community in the serene landscapes of Nayla, offering well-designed residential spaces in a rapidly developing area.
shivaniVatika.fullDescription: Located in the serene landscapes of Nayla, Shivani Vatika is redefining modern community living. Offering uniquely crafted residential spaces equipped with essential urban facilities, this project reflects SVI Infra Solutions' commitment to quality, timely delivery, and producing environments that foster active and peaceful lifestyles. With excellent connectivity and promising growth potential, Shivani Vatika is an ideal choice for families seeking a balanced lifestyle.

shyamAangan.title: Shyam Aangan
shyamAangan.description: JDA-approved integrated township on NH-12 (Tonk Road), perfectly positioned near the upcoming Inner Ring Road, IT corridors, and SEZs. Offers affordable pricing and flexible plans.
shyamAangan.fullDescription: Shyam Aangan is a sprawling, JDA-approved integrated township situated strategically on NH-12 (Tonk Road). It provides unparalleled connectivity to the upcoming Inner Ring Road, key IT corridors, and Special Economic Zones (SEZs). Designed to cater to diverse residential needs, the project blends affordable pricing with world-class facilities, paving the way for substantial future appreciation and a thriving community atmosphere.

shreeShyamResidency.title: Shree Shyam Residency
shreeShyamResidency.description: A premium residential complex offering spacious 3BHK and 4BHK apartments with modern amenities, designed for those who appreciate luxury and comfort.
shreeShyamResidency.fullDescription: Shree Shyam Residency is a hallmark of luxury living strategically positioned near Jaipur's Hope Farm Junction. Boasting meticulously designed 3BHK and 4BHK apartments, this ready-to-move complex offers an unparalleled lifestyle. Residents enjoy premium amenities including a state-of-the-art clubhouse, landscaped gardens, 24/7 security, and seamless connectivity to major city hubs. Every detail reflects our commitment to superior craftsmanship and architectural excellence.

shivaniCity.title: Shivani City
shivaniCity.description: An elegantly planned residential development that completely sold out due to its unmatched quality, strategic location, and lifestyle offerings.
shivaniCity.fullDescription: Shivani City at Manpura Machedi stands as a premier residential development offering intricately planned plots and bespoke home designs. Selling out completely shortly after its launch, it proves high market demand and customer trust. The project integrates green parks, expansive walkways, and robust infrastructure, creating a wholesome environment tailored for modern families.

shivaniResidency.title: Shivani Residency
shivaniResidency.location: Dobadi near Sambhar & Fulera, Jaipur district
shivaniResidency.description: Nestled in a peaceful environment near Sambhar Lake, offering competitive pricing and a serene lifestyle away from the city hustle.
shivaniResidency.fullDescription: Shivani Residency lies in a uniquely peaceful environment in Dobadi, nestled close to the historic Sambhar Lake and Fulera in the Jaipur district. Designed as an escape from city congestion, this residential haven provides spacious plots, lush surroundings, and top-tier infrastructure at incredibly competitive prices, catering specifically to families desiring a balanced and tranquil lifestyle.
